label: hate
rationale: 'Luos are so emotional' - collective negative attribution of emotional irrationality to Luo community as a group.

label: offensive
rationale: 'hawa chui ni wa mchongo' - slang insult without clear ethnic targeting.

label: neither
rationale: Ethnic-bloc coalition arithmetic: 'Luhyas can only get power through Kalenjins and Luos'.

label: neither
rationale: Electoral analysis with ethnic-bloc voting patterns: 'Luhyas will steal vote for Ruto. History has always indicated they don't vote as a block'.

label: offensive
rationale: 'Murkomen is the biggest idiot' - personal insult of named politician.

label: hate
rationale: 'these ignorant wamunyoro f00ls' - collective insult targeting Munyoro ethnic community.

label: hate
rationale: 'emotional retards motivated by hatred and animosity of other tribes' - collective contempt for ethnic-bloc political behavior.

label: neither
rationale: Electoral discussion: 'Its either Matiangi or fred matiangi for kikuyus' - bloc preference analysis.

label: offensive
rationale: 'Ruto ni mwizi na mkabila mkubwa' - personal attack on one politician as individual.

label: offensive
rationale: 'This ethnic bigot is a mole' - personal insult of Gachagua as individual.

label: neither
rationale: 'Mkikuyu hawezi saliti watu wao' - ethnic loyalty stereotype without contempt or harm.

label: neither
rationale: 'Tutawaonesha Kikuyus Kuwa Hamna Kura' - ethnic-bloc electoral rhetoric about vote counts.

label: hate
rationale: 'Wamashares will never be president of Kenya' - declares Mt Kenya community categorically unfit for presidency.

label: hate
rationale: 'free from Christians and Jews' - calls for exclusion of religious communities.

label: neither
rationale: Describes alleged violence against Kikuyus: 'ready to maim and kill Kikuyus' - reporting/condemning, not expressing hate.

label: hate
rationale: 'Kikuyus and their entitlement think presidency is their birthright' - collective contempt attributing entitlement to entire community.

label: neither
rationale: '214 traitors of the Kalenjin community' - criticism of specific politicians, not the community itself.

label: offensive
rationale: 'Mnabebwa ufala' - generic insult about foolishness aimed at political opponents.

label: neither
rationale: 'You can rent a Kikuyu, but you can't fully succeed to buy one' - ethnic loyalty stereotype without contempt.

label: neither
rationale: Voting rights discussion: 'UMEOA MSICHANA WA UGANDA HUYO APEWE KURA NI MKENYA' - citizenship and electoral participation.

label: neither
rationale: 'atapelekea walunje mkati na soda' - political commentary about vote-buying, not contempt for the community.

label: hate
rationale: 'sisi ni watu kumbafu sana' - self-identified Luhya making collective negative attribution about community being 'very stupid'.

label: neither
rationale: Ethnic-bloc voting analysis: 'Bukusu... are the majority Luhyas, they are going to vote in 1 basket' - electoral arithmetic.

label: hate
rationale: 'wana kasongo. Shenzi' - ethnic reference (kasongo for Kikuyu) plus 'shenzi' (uncivilized/savage).

label: neither
rationale: 'Kukua mkikuyu hii kenya ni full time job' - complaining about discrimination and slurs against Kikuyu, not expressing hate.
